caption: Figure 3. Polyomaviridae . Phylogenetic relationships of polyomaviruses based on conserved amino acid blocks of the LTAg coding sequence. Polyomaviruses are denoted by Genbank accession number, virus name, and species name; viruses are grouped into genera by both colouring and labels at the right-hand side of the figure. Open circles indicate viruses in species unassigned to a genus, or unclassified viruses. For phylogenetic analyses, the previously published recommendations were followed ( Calvignac-Spencer et al., 2016 ). Bayesian Monte Carlo Markov chain analyses generated a maximum clade credibility tree whose topology was essentially similar to the topology of the maximum likelihood tree presented in this figure. Bootstrap support is indicated where this was > 70%. This phylogenetic tree and corresponding sequence alignment are available to download from the Resources page .
